title: Identity language and coded mark development
summary: A fifteen-year identity evolution: revisiting the original commission, developing the SOS / SaveOurS abbreviation as Morse code, then embedding a second barcode-like machine-readable challenge inside the mark.

lensAssignments.rationale: The responsibility centres on meaning, recognition, identity, visual language or the designed human experience.
This is a distinct supporting responsibility: The responsibility centres on defining the system model, boundaries, structure, workflows or intended operation.
lensAssignments.lensSummary: System and product-definition responsibility: A fifteen-year identity evolution: revisiting the original commission, developing the SOS / SaveOurS abbreviation as Morse code, then embedding a second barcode-like machine-readable challenge inside the mark.
